projects.name: Enterprise-Security-Reconnaissance-Scanning-Platform
projects.description: An automated, distributed security scanning and asset discovery pipeline. The platform chains subdomain discovery, port scanning, HTTP validation, and web crawling with a multi-consumer worker pool running vulnerability scans, aggregating the findings into a centralized database with a real-time TUI dashboard.

projects.name: Windows-11-Privacy-Debloat-Scripts
projects.description: A small PowerShell toolkit for reducing Windows 11 bloat and improving privacy without switching to Linux or breaking core Windows security features.

projects.name: Dirfuzz
projects.description: DirFuzz has evolved from a high-performance web security fuzzer into a deterministic **Bug Bounty Intelligence Operating System**. It is built around an immutable Event Ledger, capable of projecting complex attack surface graphs, continuous regression tracking, playbook intelligence, and deterministic Analyst workflows.

projects.name: H1-Scope-Watcher
projects.description: ever miss a new in-scope target again. H1 Scope Watcher polls the HackerOne API on a schedule, diffs scope entries against the last known state, and fires a rich notification the moment something changes new domains added, targets removed, bounty eligibility updated, severity ceiling changed.

projects.name: BugMap-Studio
projects.description: BugMap Studio is a React based, interactive mind map visualization tool designed specifically for bug bounty hunters and penetration testers. It allows users to visually organize and track their reconnaissance data, including targets, subdomains, endpoints, vulnerabilities, credentials, and custom notes.

projects.name: recon-mcp
projects.description: recon-mcp is a local Python MCP server for safe, human-led bug bounty recon. It provides lightweight helpers for scope checks, headers, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, JavaScript URL collection, endpoint extraction, URL deduplication, evidence notes, and manual test planning.

projects.name: SMB-Samba-Compliance-Audit-Tool
projects.description: A high performance SMB compliance and audit script using the impacket library for native protocol interaction. Supports share enumeration, permission auditing, password policy retrieval, user/group enumeration, and backup file discovery.

projects.name: CTF-Challenges
projects.description: This repo contains only code used to solve different challenges in CTF competitions.

projects.name: Burp-Theme-Lab
projects.description: Burp Theme Lab is a clean, simple, and robust Burp Suite extension that allows you to change Burp Suite's Look and Feel directly from inside a custom "Theme Lab" tab using standard Java Swing APIs and FlatLaf themes.

projects.name: simple-read-aloud-extension
projects.description: A lightweight, privacy-focused Microsoft Edge extension that reads text aloud using the Web Speech API. It features a beautiful Dracula-themed UI, customizable voice settings, and productivity features like auto-read on selection.

projects.name: Canvas-Fingerprint-Blocker-Modified
projects.description: This extension prevents HTML canvas element from generating a unique identification key to protect user's privacy. It works by adding slight noise to the canvas data, making the fingerprint inconsistent and unique for each session.

projects.name: TraceMap
projects.description: TraceMap is a local-first reverse engineering helper for Linux binaries. It traces beginner-relevant libc and system-facing behavior with Frida, saves the execution as structured JSON, and turns that run into reports, graphs, compare output, and gdb hints.

projects.name: Burp-Shadow-API-Visualizer
projects.description: Shadow API Visualizer is a Burp Suite extension designed to help bug hunters and penetration testers discover hidden, unused, or "shadow" API endpoints by statically analyzing client-side code in real-time.

projects.name: JS-Miner-Pro-Burp-Suite-Extension
projects.description: JS Miner Pro is a lightweight, customizable Burp Suite extension designed to find hard-coded secrets, API endpoints, and hidden paths inside JavaScript, JSON, and HTML files.

projects.name: Nuclei-Matcher-Burp-Suite-Extension
projects.description: Nuclei Matcher watches your Burp Suite traffic in real-time and automatically identifies technologies, misconfigurations, and potential vulnerabilities then suggests the exact Nuclei templates to run against each target.

projects.name: CVE-Matcher
projects.description: CVE Matcher is a passive Burp Suite extension built with the Montoya API. It silently analyzes HTTP response headers (like `Server`, `X-Powered-By`, etc.) to extract software banners and automatically queries the NIST National Vulnerability Database (NVD) to surface known Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures (CVEs) in real-time.

projects.name: Shodan-Correlator
projects.description: Shodan Correlator is a passive Burp Suite extension built with the Montoya API. It automatically enriches the hosts you browse by querying the Shodan API. It correlates HTTP response hostnames to their IP addresses and fetches valuable infrastructure and vulnerability intelligence in real-time.

projects.name: Spring-Boot-Actuator-Hunter-Burp-Suite-Extension
projects.description: A lightweight, high-speed Burp Suite extension designed to detect exposed Spring Boot Actuator endpoints. It automatically fuzzes target applications for sensitive administrative paths that can leak environment variables, API mappings, and routing configurations.

projects.name: Lean-Windows-CTF-Toolkit-Automated-Setup
projects.description: This repository contains a PowerShell script that automatically downloads and sets up essential reverse engineering tools for CTF competitions on Windows.

projects.name: Blueprint-App-AI
projects.description: Blueprint App is an AI-assisted electronics design tool for turning a plain-English hardware idea into a structured electronics blueprint.

projects.name: Lumina
projects.description: Lumina delivers a pure stream of knowledge directly to your console.

projects.name: RssTool2.0
projects.description: RSSBot Elite delivers real-time RSS and YouTube feed notifications across multiple Discord channels, each with custom categories and smart webhook routing.

projects.name: shodan-mcp
projects.description: Passive reconnaissance MCP server powered by Shodan. Scope-gated against your HackerOne snapshots — identical gate to `nuclei-mcp`.

projects.name: vulnx-MCP-Server
projects.description: A fully self-contained MCP server that wraps ProjectDiscovery vulnx all inside Docker, nothing installed on your host.

projects.name: Sniper-MCP
projects.description: Simple microservice for Sniper MCP.

projects.name: PayloadArsenal-mcp
projects.description: A small MCP (Model Context Protocol) server exposing search and read tools for a local payload/wordlist "arsenal" (e.g., PayloadsAllTheThings, SecLists).

projects.name: HackerOne-Hacktivity-MCP
projects.description: Lightweight MCP (Model Context Protocol) adapter that exposes HackerOne Hacktivity search and public report scraping as tools.

projects.name: SearchSploit-MCP
projects.description: Lightweight MCP (Modular Component Protocol) adapter that exposes local Exploit-DB / SearchSploit functionality as MCP tools. Intended for use as a microservice inside an MCP-enabled workflow or container.

projects.name: nuclei-mcp
projects.description: A scoped Nuclei MCP server that **refuses to scan anything not found in your HackerOne scope snapshots**.  Works as a companion to `h1-scope-watcher`.

projects.name: Terminal-IDE
projects.description: A terminal-based IDE written in Go using Bubble Tea, Lip Gloss, and Chroma.

projects.name: WebSocket-Smuggler-Modular
projects.description: The WebSocket Smuggler (Modular) is a specialized Burp Suite extension designed to automate the detection and exploitation of HTTP Request Smuggling vulnerabilities that arise from faulty WebSocket connection handling by reverse proxies.

projects.name: cfunveil
projects.description: CloudFlare Origin IP Discovery Tool for Bug Bounty Hunters  Chains several intelligence modules to uncover origin IPs hidden behind CloudFlare and similar reverse proxies.

projects.name: Fast-Scope-Manager
projects.description: This is a Burp Suite extension that provides a quick and easy way to manage your target scope directly from the Proxy history.

projects.name: SwaggerHunter
projects.description: A Swagger/OpenAPI enumerator and lightweight endpoint probing tool. Automatically parses Swagger/OpenAPI specifications, lists all API endpoints, applies optional filters (HTTP methods, limits)

projects.name: 403-Forbidden-Buster
projects.description: An Automated 403 Bypass Fuzzer for Burp Suite Community & Professional

projects.name: shodan-extention
projects.description: Simple Firefox/Chrome extension (Manifest V3) that shows Shodan information for the current tab's hostname.

projects.name: S3bucketList
projects.description: A Firefox extension (Manifest V3) that passively scans web traffic for S3-style hostnames and probes them for public access permissions.

projects.name: BashReconKit
projects.description: This tool is a command-line based network reconnaissance tool with various functionalities useful for information gathering and vulnerability assessment in the context of cybersecurity.

projects.name: favicon-hasher
projects.description: A Python tool that calculates the Shodan-compatible MMH3 hash of a website’s favicon.

projects.name: Next.js-RSC-RCE-Scanner-Burp-Suite-Extension
projects.description: Burp Suite extension to detect the Next.js / React Server Components (RSC) Remote Code Execution vulnerability (CVE-2025-55182 & CVE-2025-66478).

projects.name: Active-Directory
projects.description: Do not use these tools on unauthorized systems. Accessing a computer network without authorization is a crime. The author is not responsible for any misuse of this code.

projects.name: Race-Condition-Gate
projects.description: A Synchronization Tool for testing Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) Vulnerabilities

projects.name: Api-Version-Fuzzer
projects.description: API Version Hunter is a Burp Suite extension designed to automatically identify and fuzz versioned API endpoints. It helps penetration testers and bug bounty hunters discover undocumented or older API versions (e.g., v1, v2, v3) that may lack security controls present in the current version.

projects.name: FTPHunter
projects.description: FTPHunter is a powerful and efficient tool designed for FTP server enumeration and vulnerability assessment. It allows security professionals and penetration testers to quickly discover key information about FTP servers, such as anonymous login capabilities, file access permissions, server banners, and more.

projects.name: h2csmuggler-mod
projects.description: HTTP Request Smuggling over HTTP/2 Cleartext (h2c) mod

projects.name: Hop-by-Hop-Burp-Suite-Extension
projects.description: A Tool for Exploiting Hop-by-Hop Header Stripping Vulnerabilities

projects.name: GeminiTerminal
projects.description: GeminiTerminal: A command-line interface (CLI) tool for seamless interaction with Google’s Gemini AI. Easily chat, troubleshoot, and receive helpful responses directly from your terminal. Powered by generative AI, GeminiTerminal offers a simple and effective way to engage with advanced AI models

projects.name: JavaScript-beautifier
projects.description: A one-click JavaScript beautifier and syntax highlighter right in your browser.   Built as a bookmarklet for hackers, devs, and code auditors who need instant clarity.

projects.name: TheLogRipper
projects.description: PowerShell tool for interactive Windows Event Log analysis. Extracts, highlights, and flags suspicious activity from .evtx files with export support. Built for threat hunters, SOC analysts, and DFIR ops.

projects.name: sniff
projects.description: A lightweight packet sniffer for Windows and Linux that captures Layer 2 (Ethernet) packets, displaying detailed hex and ASCII output. It supports sniffing on any network interface and saves packets to a PCAP file for analysis.
